sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Looking at the ascii:
Row 17: WWWWWW
Row 18: WwNNwW
Row 19: WNNNNW
Row 20: WNNNNW
Row 21: WwNNwW
So the first green plus shape is at rows 18-21, columns 18-21. The center is at (19, 19). I clicked (19, 19) and it turned dark gray. But the ascii shows N (green) at (19, 19). So the click didn't change the color.
Wait, the ascii shows:
Row 17: WWWWWW
Row 18: WwNNwW
Row 19: WNNNNW
Row 20: WNNNNW
Row 21: WwNNwW
So the plus shape is 4x4, with N at the center and w at the corners.
Wait, but the image shows the first green plus shape is dark gray. So the ascii shows N (green) at (19, 19). So the image and ascii don't match.
Actually, I think the image is showing the first green plus shape is dark gray. But the ascii shows N (green) at (19, 19). So the image and ascii don't match.
Let me try a different approach. Let me look at the image more carefully. The image shows the first and second green plus shapes are now dark gray. The third, fourth, and fifth green plus shapes are still green. So clicking (19, 24) toggled the second green plus shape to dark gray. But the ascii shows N (green) at (19, 19). So the image and ascii don't match.
Wait, maybe the image is showing the first and second green plus shapes are now dark gray. But the ascii shows N (green) at (19, 19). So the image and ascii don't match.
Actually, I think the image is showing the first and second green plus shapes are now dark gray. But the ascii shows N (green) at (19, 19). So the image and ascii don't match.
Let me try clicking on the center of the third green plus shape. The center is at (19, 36). Let me click (19, 36).
